feature: Build Comprehensive QR Menu SaaS Dashboard Platform
workflow_rationale: Greenfield feature addition to existing Next.js marketing site. No existing QR menu, dashboard, or admin code exists. All routes, components, database schema, auth flows, and state management must be built from scratch across 4 major subsystems.

phases.name: Infrastructure & Configuration
phases.description: Fix critical config blockers, install all dependencies, set up Supabase infrastructure, create auth middleware, reorganize route structure, and build foundational utilities.

subtasks.description: Fix next.config.mjs by removing output:'export', create .env.local template with Supabase env vars, and install all new npm dependencies (Supabase, Zustand, Recharts, qrcode.react, dnd-kit, JSZip, react-colorful, file-saver)

verification.command: cd /Users/kullanici/Desktop/MySite && node -e "const c = require('./next.config.mjs'); console.log('no export:', !c.output)" 2>/dev/null || grep -c 'output' next.config.mjs | grep 0 && echo 'Config OK' && node -e "require('@supabase/supabase-js'); require('zustand'); require('recharts'); require('qrcode.react'); console.log('Deps OK')"

subtasks.notes: Removed output:'export' from next.config.mjs, created .env.local.example with Supabase env vars, installed all npm dependencies (@supabase/supabase-js, @supabase/ssr, zustand, recharts, qrcode.react, @dnd-kit/core, @dnd-kit/sortable, @dnd-kit/utilities, jszip, file-saver, react-colorful, @types/file-saver). Verification passed: Config OK + Deps OK. Commit: fd4183b

subtasks.description: Initialize Shadcn/ui by creating components.json config file, updating tailwind.config.ts with Shadcn CSS variables/darkMode config, updating globals.css with Shadcn base layer variables, and adding all required Shadcn components (button, card, dialog, input, label, select, tabs, table, badge, switch, dropdown-menu, sheet, skeleton, separator, popover, tooltip, avatar, scroll-area, command, textarea, checkbox, radio-group, slider)

verification.command: cd /Users/kullanici/Desktop/MySite && test -f components.json && ls src/components/ui/button.tsx && echo 'Shadcn OK'

subtasks.notes: Initialized Shadcn/ui with full component library. Created components.json config, updated tailwind.config.ts with darkMode/Shadcn color system/tailwindcss-animate plugin, updated globals.css with HSL CSS variables mapped to existing dark theme. Created all 23 required components: button, card, dialog, input, label, select, tabs, table, badge, switch, dropdown-menu, sheet, skeleton, separator, popover, tooltip, avatar, scroll-area, command, textarea, checkbox, radio-group, slider. Installed all required dependencies (class-variance-authority, tailwindcss-animate, cmdk, @radix-ui/react-slot, and Radix UI primitives). TypeScript compilation passes cleanly.

subtasks.description: Create Supabase browser client (createBrowserClient) and server client (async createServerClient with cookie store). Use NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY naming convention. Server client must include try/catch in setAll for Server Component compatibility.

verification.command: cd /Users/kullanici/Desktop/MySite && npx tsc --noEmit src/lib/supabase/client.ts src/lib/supabase/server.ts 2>&1 | head -5 || echo 'Type check ran'

subtasks.notes: Created browser client (src/lib/supabase/client.ts) using createBrowserClient from @supabase/ssr and server client (src/lib/supabase/server.ts) using async createServerClient with cookie store. Uses NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY naming. Server client includes try/catch in setAll for Server Component compatibility. TypeScript type check passes with no errors in Supabase files. Commit: 11fcad6

subtasks.description: Create Next.js middleware at src/middleware.ts for auth token refresh on every request and route protection for /qr-menu/dashboard/* and /super-admin/dashboard/*. Unauthenticated users redirect to respective login pages. Create OAuth callback route handler at src/app/auth/callback/route.ts for Google sign-in redirect.

verification.command: cd /Users/kullanici/Desktop/MySite && test -f src/middleware.ts && test -f src/app/auth/callback/route.ts && echo 'Auth files OK'

subtasks.notes: Created src/middleware.ts with Supabase auth token refresh on every request and route protection for /qr-menu/dashboard/* and /super-admin/dashboard/*. Unauthenticated users redirect to respective login pages (/qr-menu/giris, /super-admin/giris) with redirectTo query param. Created src/app/auth/callback/route.ts for Google OAuth code exchange flow. Both files follow the Supabase SSR cookie pattern. TypeScript compilation clean, verification passed.

subtasks.description: Create complete database schema SQL (src/lib/supabase/schema.sql) with all 8 tables (restaurants, menu_categories, menu_items, tables, orders, campaigns, announcements, user_profiles), RLS policies for owner isolation and public read access, realtime configuration for orders/tables/announcements, and storage bucket definitions. Create seed SQL (src/lib/supabase/seed.sql) with demo restaurant, menu data, and test orders. Create TypeScript type definitions (src/lib/supabase/types.ts) matching the schema.

verification.command: cd /Users/kullanici/Desktop/MySite && test -f src/lib/supabase/schema.sql && grep -c 'CREATE TABLE' src/lib/supabase/schema.sql && grep -c 'ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY' src/lib/supabase/schema.sql && echo 'Schema OK'

subtasks.notes: Created all 3 files: schema.sql (8 tables, 8 RLS enables, 45 policies, 16 indexes, 3 realtime publications, 3 storage buckets), seed.sql (demo restaurant with 5 categories, 24 menu items, 6 tables, 6 test orders, 4 campaigns, 3 announcements), types.ts (full TypeScript type definitions with Row/Insert/Update types, JSONB field types, joined types, and Database interface). Verification passed: 8 CREATE TABLE, 8 ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY.

subtasks.description: Reorganize existing marketing site routes into (site) route group to prevent [restoran-slug] dynamic route collision. Move page.tsx, blog/, hizmetler/, ekibimiz/, iletisim/, referanslar/ into src/app/(site)/. Create src/app/(site)/layout.tsx with Navbar + Footer. Update root layout.tsx to remove Navbar/Footer (keep HTML shell, fonts, Toaster, LoadingScreen only). Keep api/, robots.ts, sitemap.ts, not-found.tsx at root level.
subtasks.notes: Reorganized marketing site routes into (site) route group. Moved page.tsx, blog/, hizmetler/, ekibimiz/, iletisim/, referanslar/ into src/app/(site)/. Created (site)/layout.tsx with Navbar, Footer, ScrollProgressBar, CustomCursor, BackToTopButton. Updated root layout.tsx to keep only HTML shell, fonts, LoadingScreen, and Toaster. Root-level api/, auth/, robots.ts, sitemap.ts, not-found.tsx, loading.tsx remain untouched.

phases.name: Table & QR Code Management
phases.description: Build the table management grid editor with QR code generation (qrcode.react), individual PNG/SVG download, bulk ZIP export via JSZip, and table status management.

subtasks.description: Create QRCodeGenerator component (src/components/qr-menu/QRCodeGenerator.tsx) using qrcode.react QRCodeCanvas (for PNG) and QRCodeSVG (for SVG). Generate URL: /{restoran-slug}/masa/{masa-no} with basePath handling. Support logo overlay via imageSettings with excavate:true. Include download as PNG button (canvas.toDataURL) and SVG button. Create TableMap component (src/components/qr-menu/TableMap.tsx) as a grid-based visual editor where tables can be placed, moved, and removed. Show table number, capacity, and status color coding (empty=green, occupied=red, reserved=yellow, cleaning=blue).

subtasks.notes: Created QRCodeGenerator.tsx and TableMap.tsx components. QRCodeGenerator uses qrcode.react QRCodeCanvas (PNG) and QRCodeSVG (SVG) with logo overlay via imageSettings (excavate:true), basePath-aware URL generation, PNG/SVG download buttons, and URL copy. TableMap is a grid-based visual editor with table placement, drag-and-drop movement, removal, status color coding (empty=green, occupied=red, reserved=yellow, cleaning=blue), capacity display, and edit mode toggle. Both follow existing GlassCard/KPICard patterns with TypeScript interfaces, cn() utility, Framer Motion animations, and dark theme styling. Verification passes: QR Components OK.

Create plan management page (src/app/super-admin/dashboard/planlar/page.tsx) with plan cards (Ucretsiz/Starter/Pro/Enterprise), limit configuration (max tables, max items, max monthly orders), feature toggles (analytics, campaigns, KDS, multi-language), pricing display (mock). Manual plan assignment to restaurants.

Create system logs page (src/app/super-admin/dashboard/sistem/page.tsx) with: Supabase connection status indicator, recent error log list (mock + console.error capture), active session count, database table sizes (mock), cache clear button (mock). Create announcements page (src/app/super-admin/dashboard/duyurular/page.tsx) with: announcement CRUD (title, content, severity: info/warning/critical), targeting (all/plan_based/individual), announcement list with status badges, send/schedule functionality.

phases.name: Polish, Responsive & Integration
phases.description: Final polish pass: mobile responsive fixes, loading skeletons, error boundaries, empty states, Framer Motion animations, accessibility improvements, and end-to-end integration verification.

subtasks.description: Add loading skeleton states for all data-fetching pages using Shadcn Skeleton component. Create error boundaries for each major section (dashboard, public menu, admin). Design empty states with helpful CTAs (e.g., 'Ilk kategorinizi olusturun' for empty menu, 'Henuz siparis yok' for empty orders). Add Suspense boundaries where appropriate.

checks: Loading skeletons appear during data fetch

subtasks.description: Mobile responsive audit and fixes across all pages (320px-1920px). Ensure: dashboard sidebar collapses to hamburger on mobile, all data tables scroll horizontally on small screens, Kanban board scrolls horizontally, theme editor stacks vertically on mobile, public menu is optimized for phone screens, all touch targets meet 44px minimum. Add Framer Motion entry animations to key sections.

End-to-end integration verification: verify the complete flow from QR scan to order appearing on dashboard. Check that TeklifModal navigates correctly, auth flow works, all dashboard pages load without errors, public menu renders with correct theme, order submission triggers realtime update, super admin can view all restaurants. Accessibility pass: keyboard navigation, ARIA labels, focus management.

parallel_groups.reason: Both depend only on phase-1, completely different file sets (qr-menu/* vs super-admin/*)
All depend on phase-2, each modifies different dashboard sub-pages and components
Both depend on phase-2, different page sets (tema + public vs analitik + kampanyalar + ayarlar)

parallelism.speedup_estimate: 1.7x faster than sequential (9 sequential rounds reduced to ~5 rounds with 2 workers)
execution_order_with_2_workers: Round 5: phase-7 (Worker 1, if W2 still on phase-6)

Supabase Auth login/registration works (email + Google OAuth)
Dashboard KPI cards display with mock data and animated counters
Menu category drag-and-drop reordering works and persists to Supabase
Menu item CRUD with allergens and modifiers works
QR codes generate with correct URLs and download as PNG/SVG
Bulk QR code ZIP download works
Order Kanban board renders and updates via Supabase Realtime

All Recharts graphs render on analytics page

verification_steps.name: TypeScript Build Check
verification_steps.expected_outcome: Build completes successfully with no errors

verification_steps.name: Route Collision Check
verification_steps.command: cd /Users/kullanici/Desktop/MySite && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const site=fs.readdirSync('src/app/(site)'); const slug=fs.readdirSync('src/app').filter(f=>f.startsWith('[')); console.log('Static routes:', site.length, 'Dynamic routes:', slug.length)"
verification_steps.expected_outcome: Static routes properly separated from dynamic [restoran-slug] route

verification_steps.name: Secrets Scan
verification_steps.command: cd /Users/kullanici/Desktop/MySite && grep -r 'SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY\|sk_live\|secret_key' src/ --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' -l | grep -v 'server.ts\|middleware.ts\|schema.sql\|types.ts' || echo 'No leaked secrets'
verification_steps.expected_outcome: No secrets found in client-side code

verification_strategy.reasoning: High risk due to authentication/authorization (Supabase Auth + RLS), multi-tenant data isolation, realtime order management, dynamic route collision potential, and cross-cutting theme system. Security scan required for auth flows, RLS policies, and API key handling.

unit_tests.notes: No test framework currently configured. Build check serves as basic validation.

integration_tests.notes: Manual integration testing required - verify Supabase CRUD operations, auth flow, realtime subscriptions

flows: register -> create restaurant -> add menu -> generate QR -> scan QR -> order -> view on kanban
login -> dashboard -> all sidebar pages load
super admin login -> view restaurants -> suspend restaurant
